# AI API status and maintenance reference

> First-party catalog, maintenance and integration notes maintained by the operator of AIFast.

## Scope

This project does not claim real-time monitoring, fixed latency, success rate, uptime, node count or an SLA. Model status should be checked through the current catalog, maintenance notices and an authenticated request from the deployment network.

## Catalog examples checked on 2026-07-13

- `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- `grok-4.5`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- `qwen3.7-max`, `qwen3.7-plus`
- `glm-5.2`
- `kimi-k2.7-code`

Configuration does not guarantee current availability.

## Test requirements

Publish latency or reliability observations only with a timestamp, model ID, test region, network, sample count, p50/p95 and HTTP status distribution.

## International payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Fiat payment is not available to international users.
- Check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console.

This is an AIFast balance-unit conversion. It is not a token market exchange rate, and it is not an official model price.

## Links

- https://www.aifast.club
- https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/
- https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker
